name: Speckle-Faceted Ceramic Bergamot Jar Candle Green/White 6oz - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Spread a fresh, citrusy aroma around your home with the Speckle-Faceted Ceramic Bergamot Jar Candle from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This white jar candle features a speckled, faceted design with green on the inside for a beautiful look, and the mix of lemon, musk, cedar, bergamot and jasmine scents provides a refreshing ambiance. Filled with palm and paraffin wax, this faceted jar candle burns for approximately 20 hours.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
